name: bestdel
description: BestDel — AI multi-model MUN research assistant.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c bgBlue,bgGreen "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
